sql_array: CREATE TABLE t_authors (author_id int NOT NULL, author_name varchar(255) NOT NULL, author_info long varchar);
INSERT INTO t_authors (author_id, author_name, author_info) VALUES (1, 'John Doe', '<author><age>30</age><location>USA</location><books><book>Book1</book><book>Book2</book></books></author>');
INSERT INTO t_authors (author_id, author_name, author_info) VALUES (2, 'Jane Smith', '<author><age>25</age><location>UK</location><books><book>Book3</book><book>Book4</book></books></author>');
UPDATE t_authors SET author_info = '<author><age>31</age><location>Canada</location><books><book>Book1</book><book>Book5</book></books></author>' WHERE author_id = 1;
SELECT xpath_eval('//location', xml_tree_doc(author_info), 0) AS author_locations FROM t_authors WHERE author_id = 2;
